title: Camp Denali Develops 90kW Solar Project
summary: Camp Denali Develops 90kW Solar Project Tour Green partner, Camp Denali, continues its long commitment to clean energy Located 90 miles from the nearest power grid, Camp Denali has harnessed the benefits of renewable energy for most of its history. From their first hydroelectric system, developed in 1981, to subsequent photovoltaics and passive-solar hot water, they continue to explore evol...
